response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years experience requirement with 15+ years across full-stack roles, and has direct recent experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, matching the AI agent development requirement. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin/Java depth (Java listed but limited recent use), and Vitest is not explicitly mentioned, but the overall engineering breadth and craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD) make this a strong fit worth interviewing.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React and MongoDB at Optilyz and re:cinq
Direct AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at current role, matching a key requirement
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Vitest not listed; testing experience appears stronger in Selenium/D-lang ecosystems than the required JS test stack
Kotlin not mentioned and Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
